zh.lifeSummary: Margery Durward是Edward Durward的女兒，於大約1360年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯。她於大約1380年與Robert Hethe結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1410年在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Durward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dorward
meanings: English and Scottish (Angus and Fife): occupational name from Older Scots, Middle English dor(e)ward ‘doorkeeper, porter’ (Old English duru-weard). In medieval Scotland the office of the king's doorward, Hostiarius regis, was hereditary and of considerable honor. The specific surname still common around Arbroath is probably from the office of doorward of the Abbey. The 13th-century royal ushers or doorwards of Scotland were based at Lundie in Angus.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Durward was born about 1360, in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Edward Durward. She married Robert Hethe about 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1410, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Durwardは約1360年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブレスでEdward Durwardの娘として生まれた。約1380年にRobert Hetheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1410年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Durward(은)는 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스에서 Edward Durward의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 Robert Hethe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery Durward родилась около 1360 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Edward Durward. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hethe около 1380 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1410 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
